products.description: PT Actuator Belt Force. electromagnetic dual-channel belt tensioner. available from PT Actuator. Dual left/right channels with rated 12 kg and peak 17 kg pull force per channel, RGB harness tower, and SimHub/PT-Actuator SDK support.

products.description: PT Actuator Active Belt Tensioner Pro + Tower. motor/spool active belt tensioner. currently out of stock on official shop. Dual-channel Sim Racing Studio belt system with 12 kg pull force per channel and 381 mm / 15 in stroke.
PT Actuator Active Belt Tensioner + Tower. motor/spool active belt tensioner. currently out of stock on official shop. 5-point belt system with 15 kg max pull force and Sim Racing Studio integration.
Qubic System QS-BT1. dual-channel direct-drive belt tensioner. available via distributors / contact Qubic for lead time. Dual-channel direct-drive seat belt tensioner.

eRacing-Lab RS Active Force. dual-actuator active belt kit. available from eRacing-Lab shop. Package includes Thanos4U controller, two RS actuators with servo motors/drivers, carbon-fiber roller bar, and 5-point 2.5 in quick-buckle belt.

Belt Tensioner Robot Servo. SimHub active belt tensioner using hobby servos. Older working DIY project; GitHub metadata showed last update in 2022. Active sim-racing harness tensioner controlled from SimHub.

Flag Ghost Belt Tensioner. Compact AASD/90ST servo active harness tensioner. Community DIY design referenced by Thanos, Motion4Sim, and OverTake posts. Plans appear to be distributed privately or sold by FlagGhost rather than published as an open repository. Compact active belt design for sim racing harness cueing.
products.maker: FlagGhost / community plan seller through Thanos Discord
products.license: Unknown; no explicit open-source license found. Plans are reported as available for purchase from FlagGhost.

products.description: gTenxor. SimHub plugin and Arduino/gTenxor servo controller. Public prototype/plugin project from 2023; small community footprint. SimHub plugin controls a seat belt/harness from telemetry.

Hoernle Belt Tensioner. Free 80/90ST servo active harness tensioner with single and dual axis versions. Public community design started in June 2022; OverTake thread first post edited for v1.5 on 2025-11-16. Multiple community builds are reported. Converts simulator telemetry into harness pull for sustained braking and lateral-force cueing.
products.maker: Hoernle / OverTake and Virtual Racing community
products.license: Free community project; explicit hardware/software license not found in researched sources.

products.description: LeBois GT v3.0 Belt Tensioner. SimHub Arduino 350 W motor-and-spool DIY harness tensioner. Public DIY project from 2020, updated through 2026, but author now marks the mod not recommended due to reliability limits and points builders toward P1 or future V4. Budget DIY active harness tensioner for braking, ABS, shifting, and negative-G style cues.
products.license: 3D files download page states Creative Commons BY-NC-ND for distributed files.

products.description: SilentChill oDrive Belt Tensioner. ODrive dual-motor 3D printed active harness tensioner. Public video-documented DIY prototype from around 2023; shared files/configs are referenced in video notes and comments rather than a formal repository. 3D-printed active seat belt tensioner built around ODrive motor control.
products.license: Unknown; no explicit open-source license found for STL/config sharing.
